message:
Running command: # Wait 2 minutes, then check synthesis progress
sleep 120
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v2_full.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null
echo "---steps completed---"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/ | sort -V
echo "---log tail---"
tail -8 /tmp/pnr_v2_full.log
